text:
Department of Neurology

Clinic Date: 12 August 2021

Dr Amelia Carter
St George’s University Hospitals NHS Foundation Trust
Neurology Department, Blackshaw Road, London SW17 0QT

Dear Dr Amelia Carter,

Emily Turner, DOB: 14-03-2012, Hospital No: H937520 NHS No. 9043175268
27 Maple Close, Wimbledon, London SW19 3AB

Reason for letter:
Invitation to school care-plan meeting (administrative coordination).

Summary:
I am writing to invite relevant school staff, parents/guardians, and our clinic administrative representative to a care-plan meeting for Emily Turner. This meeting will focus on practical arrangements in the school setting, including agreed points of contact, escalation pathways, and documentation of individualized support. The family reports a background of anxiety/low mood, and we wish to ensure supportive communication and clear processes to reduce unnecessary distress.

Proposed details:
- Format: 30–40 minute virtual meeting (MS Teams) or in-person at the school, per parent preference.
- Provisional date/time: within the next 3–4 weeks; please provide three suitable slots.
- Attendees: Parent/guardian, designated school lead (SENCO or pastoral lead), school first-aid representative, and clinic administrator. Clinical review is not required on the day.
- Outputs: Updated written care plan, contact list, and agreed review date (6–12 months).

Action required:
Please reply via secure email to neurology.admin@stgeorges.nhs.uk with availability and preferred format. Our team will circulate an agenda and a consent form for information sharing prior to the meeting.

With best wishes,

Yours sincerely,

check__Seizure Frequency Number.analysis: The letter is an administrative invitation to a school care-plan meeting focusing on logistics and communication. It contains no mention of seizures, epilepsy, convulsions, spells, events, or any seizure-related frequency. Therefore, there is no seizure frequency information to extract.
reference: Create a reasonable NHS letter inviting to a school care-plan meeting concerning a pupil with epilepsy (admin only)

flaws.description: No seizure frequency referenced in gold
Row marked as not OK in raw dataset
